# Ceòlmhor

> Edinburgh-based Highland bagpipe tuition and performance. Structured four-tier curriculum. Professional piping for weddings, funerals, Burns Nights, corporate events, and cultural occasions across Scotland and worldwide. First lesson complimentary.

- [Home](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/): Overview of tuition, performance, and compositions services.
- [About](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/about.html): Felix Walker — piping instructor and professional piper. Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo performer; Lone Piper at the Armistice Day Service, Scottish National War Memorial; New York and Edinburgh Tartan Day Parades. Trained through Fèis Dhùn Èideann with Gaelic Medium Education background.
- [Tuition](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/tuition.html): Four-tier bagpipe curriculum taught in Edinburgh and online worldwide. Trial lesson free. Regular tuition £30/hour. Block booking: 10 lessons for the price of 9.
- [Tuition — Tier I: Foundational](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/tuition/tier-1.html): Practice chanter, eight-note scale, posture, five tunes with sheet music.
- [Tuition — Tier II: Developing](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/tuition/tier-2.html): Gracenotes, doublings, repertoire building, competition piece introduction.
- [Tuition — Tier III: Proficient](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/tuition/tier-3.html): Full transition to Highland bagpipe, blowing technique, tuning, public performance.
- [Tuition — Tier IV: Advanced](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/tuition/tier-4.html): MSR sets, Pìobaireachd introduction, competition preparation.
- [Performance](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance.html): Professional piping from £125. Based in Edinburgh; available across Scotland. Travel surcharge £0.50/mile beyond first five miles. Written contract and 50% deposit required to confirm booking.
- [Performance — Wedding & Civil Ceremony](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/wedding.html): Packages from £225 (Ceremony Piper) to £350 (Full Wedding Piper). Arrival music, bridal procession, signing of register, recessional, drinks reception.
- [Performance — Funeral & Memorial](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/funeral.html): From £125. Priority response for short-notice bookings.
- [Performance — Burns Night](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/burns.html): From £200. Burns Suppers and traditional gatherings.
- [Performance — Corporate & Business Dinner](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/corporate.html): From £200. Hotels, private venues, formal dinners, guest arrivals.
- [Performance — Ceilidh & Dance Events](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/ceilidh-cultural.html): From £200. Ceilidhs and cultural events.
- [Performance — Hogmanay & the Scottish Calendar](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/performance/hogmanay.html): From £200. Hogmanay, St Andrew's Night, and Scottish calendar occasions.
- [Compositions](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/compositions.html): Growing catalogue of original pieces — marches, airs, Pìobaireachd. Commissions accepted for personal milestones, pipe bands, institutional and heritage engagements. Private commissions from £250; event commissions from £200.
- [Gallery](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/gallery.html): Photographs from performances including Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo, Tartan Day Parades, and Scottish National War Memorial.
- [FAQ](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/faq.html): Detailed answers on tuition, performance bookings, compositions, venues, and pricing.
- [Contact / Enquire](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/contact.html): Enquiry form for tuition, performance, venue bookings, and commissions. Email: contact@ceolmhor.scot.
- [Privacy Notice](https://www.ceolmhor.scot/privacy.html): Data handling and privacy policy.
